name: LSEB Creative Corp.
business: LSEB Creative Corp. is a specialty retailer of luxury swimwear for men and women, offering gender-coordinating collections with high-quality materials and techniques. The company sells directly to consumers through its ecommerce website www.laurenbentleyswim.com and plans wholesale partnerships globally.
namedSuppliers: Lampo by Ditta Giovanni Lanfranchi S.p.A

exposures.sentence: The Company is a specialty retailer that offers men and women elevated swimwear designs, constructed with the highest quality materials and techniques.

Our ecommerce platform is powered by a bespoke Wordpress website - developed by Stories Design Studio Ltd., - as Wordpress software is secure, easy to use, and offers features such as responsive web design, search engine optimization (SEO), and fully customized pages.

catalysts.event: Announcement of intention to raise minimum $5 million USD capital
catalysts.sentence: On January 13, 2025, the Company announced it is actively pursuing a capital raise of a minimum $5 million USD to accredited investors through a series of tranches subject to satisfaction of closing conditions.

tamClaims.claim: The Global Swimwear Market Size was valued at 20.2 billion USD in 2023, and it is expected to reach a value of 30.8 billion USD by 2032, at a CAGR of 5.8% over the forecast period (2025-2033).
tamClaims.sentence: The Global Swimwear Market Size was valued at 20.2 billion USD in 2023, and it is expected to reach a value of 30.8 billion USD by 2032, at a CAGR of 5.8% over the forecast period (2025-2033).

tamClaims.claim: The luxury swimwear market in Asia-Pacific is valued at approximately USD 5.4 billion in 2024, accounting for about 23% of the global market, projected to grow at a CAGR of 8.0% from 2024 to 2031.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2024, the Asia-Pacific luxury swimwear market is valued at approximately USD 5.4 billion, accounting for about 23% of the global market. It s projected to grow at a CAGR of 8.0% from 2024 to 2031.

tamClaims.claim: North America is predicted to reach 32.5% of the market share in the coming years.
tamClaims.sentence: North America is predicted to reach 32.5% of the market share in the coming years.

tamClaims.claim: The women's swimwear application segment held a 52.4% revenue share in 2022 and is projected to reach 57.6% by 2028 with a CAGR of 6.2%.
tamClaims.sentence: According to SkyQuest, the women's swimwear application segment held a 52.4% revenue share in 2022 and is projected to witness lucrative growth to reach 57.6% by 2028 with a CAGR of 6.2%.
